narrative:
Sunfish Twp (precinct in Pike County) has 716 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.3%, a clear Republican lean of 6.7 percentage points.
